title: lycopodium pungens
intro: Lycopodium pungens, also known as club moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium pungens include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Lycopodium pungens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
